title: galium demissum subsp. stojanovii
intro: Galium demissum subsp. stojanovii, also known as Stojanov's bedstraw, is a subspecies of the Galium demissum plant, a member of the bedstraw family (Rubiaceae). Stojanov's bedstraw is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and fighting off infections. Herbal preparations of Stojanov's bedstraw can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties for treating various health conditions.
